overview: Rabab Studios is a premium music and post-production studio website with a minimalistic, dark, warm brown aesthetic. The multipage site features a cinematic hero landing page, services, filterable portfolio, about, and contact pages — all unified by a classy full-image dark banner design and Pure Sans Serif typography.
features: Cinematic full-image dark hero banner with grain texture
Multipage structure: Hero, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact
Sticky navigation with active page indicator
